scRNA-seq Analysis Report

Dataset: GEO GSE166635  |  Generated: 2026-04-19 23:42  |  Notebook: 01_scrna_analysis.ipynb
What this report covers: Single-cell RNA sequencing analysis of hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) using dataset GSE166635, which contains cells from tumour-adjacent normal tissue (HCC1) and tumour tissue (HCC2). The pipeline covers quality control, dimensionality reduction, unsupervised clustering, multi-source cell-type annotation, differential expression analysis (DEA), and gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA) — building a high-resolution map of the HCC tumour microenvironment and identifying candidate biomarkers and transcriptional drivers of disease progression.

1 · Dataset

Single-cell RNA sequencing data (10x Genomics Chromium) from two conditions obtained from GEO accession GSE166635.

Raw data — before quality filtering

16,077
raw cells — normal-adjacent (HCC1)

raw cells — tumor (HCC2)
25,189
total raw cells

3 · Dimensionality Reduction & Clustering

StepValue
PCA components used10
kNN neighbours (UMAP)15
Leiden resolutions tested0.3, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0
Resolution selected0.50
Clusters identified14

UMAP coloured by Leiden cluster (left) and by sample origin — HCC1 normal-adjacent vs. HCC2 tumour (right)

4 · Cell-type Annotation

Four evidence sources combined by majority vote per cluster: CellTypist, ScType (liver-specific, double-weighted for parenchymal types), SingleR (HPCA reference), and a curated marker-score method.

UMAP — annotated cell types

UMAP coloured by majority-vote cell-type annotation
